commands.review_summary:
The PR makes owner-scoped live session transcript hits visible to the same agent when the combined session store has no matching entry, while preserving cross-agent fail-closed behavior in memory-core and memory-wiki.

PR surface: Source +36, Tests +63. Total +99 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main emits owner-qualified session paths and parses owner metadata, but current fallback key synthesis is archived-only, so same-agent live orphan paths resolve to no key without this PR.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blockers are contributor-supplied current-head proof and maintainer acceptance of compatibility-sensitive session-history visibility, not a concrete code repair for automation.
